title: Support `std::semaphore` and typed `std::mailbox`
body:
Adds support for `std::semaphore` and strictly-typed `std::mailbox`.

~~There are two main things that need some work:~~
* ~~Using these classes requires passing the `--std` flag. Not the end of the world, but it would be nice to be able to use them out of the box.~~
* ~~The checks for methods supported with `--timing` only take the class name into account, but they should check if it's from the actual built-in package.~~
